hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:];|&])(brew (install|uninstall|remove|upgrade)|pip install|npm install -g|cargo install|gem install|go install|gh extension install|nix-env -[iueq]|nix profile (install|remove)|nix-channel)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Imperative system modifications are blocked. Add packages declaratively via README.org (nix/homebrew noweb-ref blocks) instead. See AGENTS.md."}}' || true

INPUT=$(cat); DIR=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); ROOT=$(cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null && git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$DIR"); WPF="$ROOT/.worklog-project"; if [ -f "$WPF" ]; then PROJECT=$(tr -d '[:space:]' < "$WPF"); CONFIRMED=yes; else PROJECT=$(cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null && basename "$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo "$DIR")" .git | cut -d- -f1 | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'); CONFIRMED=no; fi; if [ "$CONFIRMED" = yes ]; then echo "Worklog: project '$PROJECT' (from .worklog-project) in '$DIR'. Heartbeats are being collected automatically. To sync to Google Calendar, run /worklog sync in a dedicated session."; else echo "Worklog: project code heuristically derived as '$PROJECT' for '$DIR', but no .worklog-project file found. Before bootstrapping the cron, confirm with the user: 'Worklog will track this project as **$PROJECT** — is that the right code? (I will save it to .worklog-project so you are not asked again.)' If the user confirms, write '$PROJECT' to '$ROOT/.worklog-project'. If the user provides a different code, use that instead. Heartbeats are collected automatically — no cron needed here."; fi

INPUT=$(cat); DIR=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); ROOT=$(cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null && git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$DIR"); WPF="$ROOT/.worklog-project"; if [ -f "$WPF" ]; then PROJECT=$(tr -d '[:space:]' < "$WPF"); else PROJECT=$(cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null && basename "$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo "$DIR")" .git | cut -d- -f1 | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'); fi; DB="$HOME/.claude/worklog.db"; [ -n "$PROJECT" ] && sqlite3 "$DB" "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS heartbeats (ts TEXT NOT NULL, project TEXT NOT NULL, cwd TEXT NOT NULL, flushed INTEGER DEFAULT 0); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_hb ON heartbeats(project, flushed); INSERT INTO heartbeats(ts, project, cwd) VALUES(strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S','now','localtime'), '$PROJECT', '$DIR');" 2>/dev/null; echo 'OK'

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); fi; BASE=$(basename "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$BASE" | grep -qE '^(package\.json|package-lock\.json|pnpm-lock\.yaml|yarn\.lock|Cargo\.toml|Cargo\.lock|flake\.nix|flake\.lock|pyproject\.toml|poetry\.lock|uv\.lock|go\.mod|go\.sum|Gemfile|Gemfile\.lock|mix\.exs|mix\.lock)$' || echo "$BASE" | grep -qE '\.cabal$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"CHECKPOINT: You just edited a milestone file ('"$BASE"'). In pairprog checkpoint mode, you MUST present this change and pause for a commit before continuing to the next step. Do NOT proceed with further implementation until this change is committed."}}'; fi

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd'); branch=$(cd "$cwd" && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); ticket=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oiE '[A-Z]+-[0-9]+' | head -1 | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]'); if [ -n "$ticket" ]; then printf '%b' "\e]8;;linear://asabina/issue/$ticket\a$ticket\e]8;;\a | $cwd"; else echo "$cwd"; fi
